rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Application For Order To Show Cause
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 27, 2023 line 1. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN WEISSBERG Notice Of Hearing On Application For Order To Show Cause is GRANTED. Requirements of CCP 704.760 are met. The hearing on the Order to Show Cause for the judgment debtor to show cause why an order for sale should not be made is set for May 15, 2023. Plaintiff shall prepare an order granting this application and present it for execution at the hearing. The order shall be served in accordance with CCP 704.770.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT L. DUFFY VS. MARTIM DE ARANTES OLIVEIRA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Re Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 128.7
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 27, 2023 line 3. DEFENDANT MARTIM OLIVEIRA Defendants Re Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 128.7 is DENIED. The first amended complaint was not filed for an improper purpose and is not indisputably without merit. (Code Civ. Proc.,128.7.) The Court cannot resolve disputed factual issues at this time.=(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION VS. STEVE KISLINGBERRY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 30, 2023 line 12. DEFENDANT STEVE KISLINGBERRY MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is GRANTED. Service of Summons issued on March 16, 2023 and UD-101 filed on March 16, 2023 would be ineffective to confer jurisdiction over the specially appearing defendant. The Court notes that there is no evidence before it to show that March 16, 2023 UD-101 and Summons were ever served. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
